Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process tree should reflect the observed behavior a fixed initial sequence of RA VF AE followed by an optional loop of RMI VF that can repeat and then AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop captures the repeated requests for missing information and re validation seen in cases 1 and 3 while the non loop path in case 2 no RMI is handled by the loop being optional

Name: Hypothesis Generation - NE
Text: The final process tree is plus then a sequence for RA VF AE with a loop and in parallel a sequence for AD SC AC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - NE
Text: This structure ensures RA VF AE always occur in order The loop RMI VF can execute zero or more times matching the optional rework AD SC AC follow the loop or the initial path Silent steps are not needed here as all activities are explicit

Name: Validation - IND
Text: This balances fitness covers all traces precision avoids unnecessary branches and simplicity minimal operators

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: The model can be constructed in PM4Py by creating the root with PARALLEL operator adding the SEQUENCE for RA VF AE loop and the SEQUENCE for AD SC AC as children Each sub tree is built recursively with SEQUENCE LOOP and XOR if needed for choices setting parents explicitly

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: The final process tree is repeated multiple times with small formatting variations including AD with an extra space and the same supporting explanation restated
